translations.ja: 今日は買い物に行くよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb 'mache'.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; here means 'to do' and takes the direct object 'den Einkauf'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase; specifies the time of the action.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Einkauf', marking it as the direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'mache'; in this collocation refers to doing the shopping.

sentences.target: Sie erledigt den Einkauf nach der Arbeit.
sentences.reading: /ziː ɛɐ̯ˈleːdɪgt deːn ˈaɪ̯nkaʊ̯f naːx deːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t./

translations.de: Sie erledigt den Einkauf nach der Arbeit.
translations.ipa: /ziː ɛɐ̯ˈleːdɪgt deːn ˈaɪ̯nkaʊ̯f naːx deːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t./
translations.en: She does the shopping after work.
translations.es: Ella hace la compra después del trabajo.
translations.fr: Elle fait les courses après le travail.
translations.it: Fa la spesa dopo il lavoro.
translations.ru: Она после работы ходит за продуктами.
translations.pt: Ela faz as compras depois do trabalho.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đi chợ sau giờ làm.
translations.nl: Ze doet na het werk boodschappen.
translations.uk: Вона після роботи ходить за покупками.
translations.hi: वह काम के बाद खरीदारी करती है।
translations.el: Μετά τη δουλειά κάνει τα ψώνια.
translations.ja: 彼女は仕事のあとに買い物をする。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine nominative; subject of 'erledigt'.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; means 'to handle/take care of'; selects the object 'den Einkauf' and is modified by the PP 'nach der Arbeit'.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Einkauf', marking it as the direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'erledigt'.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces the temporal prepositional phrase 'nach der Arbeit'.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Arbeit' as the object of 'nach'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'nach'; forms a temporal adjunct.

sentences.target: Der Einkauf war diesmal ziemlich teuer.

translations.de: Der Einkauf war diesmal ziemlich teuer.
translations.en: The shopping was quite expensive this time.
translations.es: Esta vez la compra salió bastante cara.
translations.fr: Cette fois, les courses ont été assez chères.
translations.it: Stavolta la spesa è stata abbastanza cara.
translations.ko: 이번에는 장 보는 데 돈이 꽤 들었다.
translations.ru: В этот раз покупки обошлись довольно дорого.
translations.pt: Desta vez as compras ficaram bem caras.
translations.tr: Bu sefer alışveriş epey pahalıya geldi.
translations.vi: Lần này đi chợ tốn khá nhiều tiền.
translations.ar: هذه المرة كانت المشتريات مكلفة إلى حد ما.
translations.nl: Deze keer waren de boodschappen behoorlijk duur.
translations.uk: Цього разу покупки обійшлися доволі дорого.
translations.hu: Ezúttal elég drága volt a bevásárlás.
translations.hi: इस बार खरीदारी काफ़ी महंगी पड़ी।
translations.pl: Tym razem zakupy wyszły dość drogo.
translations.el: Αυτή τη φορά τα ψώνια βγήκαν αρκετά ακριβά.
translations.nb: Denne gangen ble handleturen ganske dyr.
translations.sv: Den här gången blev det ganska dyrt att handla.
translations.ro: De data asta cumpărăturile au ieșit destul de scumpe.
translations.da: Denne gang blev indkøbene ret dyre.
translations.fi: Tällä kertaa ostokset tulivat aika kalliiksi.
translations.ja: 今回は買い物がけっこう高くついた。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject 'Einkauf'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the copular clause.
Finite auxiliary (copula), preterite 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective 'teuer'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; specifies that it was so on this occasion.
Degree adverb; intensifies the predicate adjective 'teuer'.
Predicate adjective (positive degree); complement of the copula 'war'.

sentences.target: Mein Einkauf passt nicht in den Rucksack.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ˈaɪ̯nkaʊ̯f past nɪçt ɪn deːn ˈʁʊkzak./

translations.de: Mein Einkauf passt nicht in den Rucksack.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ˈaɪ̯nkaʊ̯f past nɪçt ɪn deːn ˈʁʊkzak./
translations.en: My shopping doesn't fit in the backpack.
translations.es: Mi compra no cabe en la mochila.
translations.fr: Mes courses ne rentrent pas dans le sac à dos.
translations.it: La spesa non entra nello zaino.
translations.ko: 장 본 물건들이 배낭에 안 들어간다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我买的东西装不进背包里。
translations.ru: Мои покупки не помещаются в рюкзак.
translations.pt: Minhas compras não cabem na mochila.
translations.he: הקניות שלי לא נכנסות לתיק הגב.
translations.vi: Đồ tôi mua không vừa vào ba lô.
translations.ar: مشترياتي لا تتسع في حقيبة الظهر.
translations.nl: Mijn boodschappen passen niet in de rugzak.
translations.uk: Мої покупки не вміщаються в рюкзак.
translations.hu: A bevásárlásom nem fér bele a hátizsákba.
translations.hi: मेरी खरीदी हुई चीज़ें बैकपैक में नहीं समातीं।
translations.pl: Moje zakupy nie mieszczą się w plecaku.
translations.el: Τα ψώνια μου δεν χωρούν στο σακίδιο.
translations.nb: Innkjøpene mine får ikke plass i sekken.
translations.id: Belanjaan saya tidak muat di ransel.
translations.sv: Mina varor får inte plats i ryggsäcken.
translations.ro: Cumpărăturile mele nu încap în rucsac.
translations.cs: Můj nákup se nevejde do batohu.
translations.da: Mine indkøb kan ikke være i rygsækken.
translations.ja: 買ったものがリュックに入らない。

Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the clause.

Negation particle; negates the proposition ('does not fit').
